name: Bitty Tenna
description:
An abandoned bitty in a cardboard box. He was too old to entertain his owners like he used to, so they threw him out.

-

Whatever, go my Tennaling

This is kind of based off how Tenna asks you to find somebody to adopt him in castle town lol.

He's supposed to be an older bitty and because of that he doesn't function perfectly and he isn't able to do everything asked of him which is why he was tossed ☹️ old man bitty

(Also there's a part where the ** don't work and I literally cannot fix it sorry lol)
